Suggested Homelab v3.2 menu entry:

Additionals -> Branding / Themes
  1) Apply BacsCloud branding to Nextcloud
  2) Check BacsCloud branding status
  3) Restore default Nextcloud branding

Command mapping:
  apply          -> bash additionals/branding/30-apply-bacscloud-nextcloud-branding.sh apply
  status         -> bash additionals/branding/30-apply-bacscloud-nextcloud-branding.sh status
  restore-default-> bash additionals/branding/30-apply-bacscloud-nextcloud-branding.sh restore-default
